top_signals.title: Trump tells Israel and Hizbollah to ‘stand down’ as he pushes for Iran deal
top_signals.summary: US president has said he expects Washington and Tehran to seal a deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz on Sunday
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Switzerland Rejects Proposal to Cap Population at 10 Million
top_signals.summary: Switzerland rejected a proposal to cap its population at 10 million people, as warnings about economic damage if the radical measure was introduced outweighed concerns about immigration.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
